pr.title: Update CONTRIBUTING.md to reflect correct channel
pr.author: jurrejelle

summary: Small documentation-only PR updating .github/CONTRIBUTING.md so the PR notification Discord channel name changed from `#melee` to `#smash-bros-melee`. The PR was closed unmerged after a maintainer/commenter noted it was superseded by #2181.

what_changed.change: Replaced the stated Discord notification channel for opened PRs from `#melee` to `#smash-bros-melee`.
No code, decompilation logic, build scripts, headers, or symbols were changed; diff was one added and one deleted line.

smart_moves: Kept the correction minimal and targeted to the inaccurate CONTRIBUTING.md sentence.
Updated contributor-facing onboarding information rather than leaving a stale Discord channel reference in project instructions.
decomp_lessons: Contributor workflow docs are part of decomp project health: stale communication-channel references can send new contributors to the wrong place even when no code is affected.
For documentation fixes, prefer narrow edits that only correct the inaccurate fact unless broader guide cleanup is explicitly intended.
If a doc correction is superseded by another PR, preserve the useful factual signal for future reference but do not assume this exact PR landed.
naming_conventions: Discord channel reference in CONTRIBUTING.md should use `#smash-bros-melee` rather than the older `#melee` wording, based on this PR's proposed correction.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Thanked the author but stated the PR was superseded by #2181.

follow_up_queries: Check PR #2181 for the version of the Discord channel correction that superseded this PR.
Search CONTRIBUTING.md history for other stale Discord or contributor workflow references.
